# From prototype to IDE in Firebase Studio

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9CLNxcM1tbo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

## Description

Take advantage of Firebase Studios IDE and VM features! Rody, a Developer Relations Engineer for Firebase Studio shares how you can customize code and use Gemini to make edits.

Firebase Studio → https://goo.gle/firebasestudio 

 #Firebase #NixOS

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned:,  Firebase,
